description: Barge-in test scenarios. Trigger WAVs (wav_dir) elicit long responses; interrupt WAVs (interrupt_wav_dir) are the barge-in. interrupt_wav_dir defaults to wav_dir if omitted. Use --generate-wavs for synthetic fallback.

scenarios.description: Ask for a long story, interrupt mid-response
Ask a long game question, interrupt mid-response
Interrupt very quickly (0.5s) after TTS starts
